title: Inline Scanning, Delimiters, Escapes, Code Spans, and Emphasis · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent documentation team receives a different content tree, language, route base, template, asset set, trust policy, hosting target, and accessibility need and transfers inline scanning, delimiters, escapes, code spans, and emphasis into a changed bounded inline tokenizer and delimiter resolver. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded inline tokenizer and delimiter resolver with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Advance one cursor through text, escapes, entities, code spans, delimiters, links, and literal fallbacks without dropping characters.
Match bounded backtick runs, normalize permitted interior whitespace, preserve code text, and reject missing closure predictably.
Classify delimiter runs from surrounding characters, track opener and closer state, and resolve nested emphasis deterministically.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Inline Scanner
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab publishing team handles case 5548 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to consume inline input exactly once while bounding delimiter work and preserving literals; record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-inline-complexity-12uvfh
# Competency: ssg-inline-complexity.
# Case 5151: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def evidence_ssg_inline_complexity_12uvfh(input_units: int = 64, consumed_units: int = 64, delimiter_pairs: int = 4, literal_units: int = 21, work_units: int = 112) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_12uvfh = "12uvfh-hfvu21-5151"
    assert evidence_variant_12uvfh
    evidence_axes_12uvfh = (
        "reader12uvfh",
        "source5151",
        "parsehfvu21",
        "route12uvfh5151",
        "artifact515112uvfh",
        "recoveryhfvu215151",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_12uvfh)) == 6
    if input_units < 0 or consumed_units < 0:
        return False, consumed_units, "inline-count"
    if consumed_units != input_units:
        return False, consumed_units, "unconsumed-input"
    if delimiter_pairs < 0 or literal_units < 0:
        return False, delimiter_pairs, "inline-shape"
    if work_units < input_units or work_units > input_units * 4:
        return False, work_units, "complexity-budget"
    assert consumed_units == input_units
    return True, delimiter_pairs, "bounded-inline-tokens"
